classes.EXACT_EXISTING_TOOL: only existing deterministic tools with measured compact output
classes.EXACT_EXISTING_ADAPTER: only existing deterministic adapters with measured compact output
classes.BOUNDED_SUMMARY: modeled only; excluded from lower and realistic bounds

v1_conservative_policy: No new adapter is implemented for this replay.
No compact size is invented for lower or realistic bounds.
No event is counted without measured replacement output and sufficiency.
